ksa_text: Knowledge of AI-specific regulatory frameworks, including the EU AI Act risk classification system, prohibited practices, high-risk AI system requirements, conformity assessment obligations, and AI literacy mandates.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-K-003 (Risk & Compliance/Knowledge) scores 0.510 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.510). Scope is edge_case for Clinical AI Specialist: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Risk & Compliance, composite 0.510. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk & Compliance for Clinical AI Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk & Compliance appears in approximately 75% of Clinical AI Specialist job postings. FDA/HIPAA/CE regulatory knowledge required for most clinical AI roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Risk & Compliance is market-validated for Clinical AI Specialist. Final decision: include.
